variants: Yuna Hoshimori has a diverse background rooted in design and civic engagement. She is an alumnus of the Inkwell School of Design, where she developed her artistic skills. Currently, Yuna works at the Bluefin Robotics Collective, focusing on the use of Burmese characters in her projects. Apart from her professional role, she contributes to the Kindling Arts Guild Council, playing an active part in the arts community. Her writing has also found a place in the Foxglove Lantern Press, adding to her recognition as a multifaceted creator.
